shopping_349.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
1. The agent did not correctly identify the socket type in the image as Type F (Schuko), which requires two round pins and side grounding clips.
2. The agent added items described as "Type C" which, while fitting into a Type F socket, do not provide grounding and are therefore not fully compatible.
3. The agent did not add all compatible items from the page, stopping after adding only three items without thoroughly checking the entire search results.
shopping_349.REFLECTION: For future attempts, first, precisely identify the socket type from the image (e.g., Type F / Schuko, noting its specific features like grounding clips). Then, when selecting items, prioritize those explicitly stating compatibility with the identified socket type. If explicit mentions are not available, carefully examine product images for visual confirmation of compatibility. Finally, ensure all compatible items on the current page are added to the cart before completing the task.
